g.title: actor.stat_cat:owner->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.stat_cat:sip_field->actor.stat_cat_sip_fields:field
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (sip_field) REFERENCES actor.stat_cat_sip_fields(field) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.stat_cat_entry:stat_cat->actor.stat_cat:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (stat_cat) REFERENCES actor.stat_cat(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.stat_cat_entry_default:stat_cat->actor.stat_cat:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (stat_cat) REFERENCES actor.stat_cat(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.stat_cat_entry_usr_map:stat_cat->actor.stat_cat:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (stat_cat) REFERENCES actor.stat_cat(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
